name: Action-Adventure
description: Fast-paced combat combined with exploration, puzzles, and narrative progression

mechanics.coreLoop: Explore environment → Solve environmental puzzles → Engage in dynamic combat → Discover story elements → Unlock new abilities → Access new areas
playerActions: Engage in real-time melee and ranged combat
Interact with NPCs for quests and story
Use acquired tools/gadgets to access new areas
Perform stealth takedowns or direct confrontation

mechanics: Unlock new abilities and tools through story progression
Upgrade weapons and equipment with collected resources
Skill points for combat and traversal abilities
New areas unlock via story milestones and abilities
Optional side content for additional upgrades

winConditions: Reach and conquer the final location
failConditions: Reload from last checkpoint or save point

resourceSystems.name: Health
resourceSystems.mechanics: Depletes from damage, restored with healing items or checkpoints

resourceSystems.name: Stamina
resourceSystems.mechanics: Used for sprinting, climbing, and special attacks; regenerates when idle

resourceSystems.name: Ammunition
resourceSystems.mechanics: Limited ammo for ranged weapons, found in environment or from enemies

resourceSystems.name: Upgrade Materials
resourceSystems.mechanics: Rare components for enhancing gear and abilities

setting.location: Diverse locations from jungles and ancient ruins to modern cities
setting.worldType: Grounded reality with elements of the extraordinary

protagonist.background: Skilled adventurer, treasure hunter, or explorer with a personal connection to the quest
protagonist.motivation: Uncover ancient secrets, stop a global threat, or seek redemption for past actions
abilities: Expert in hand-to-hand combat and firearms

conflict.primary: A powerful organization or individual seeks to exploit ancient artifacts or technology for world domination
secondary: Moral dilemmas about the power being pursued

worldRules.physics: Realistic physics with enhanced human capabilities (can survive larger falls, more resilient)
worldRules.magic: No traditional magic, but ancient artifacts or advanced technology may have extraordinary properties
worldRules.technology: Modern-day weapons, gadgets, and communication devices; ancient civilizations had advanced lost technology

targetAudience: Players seeking cinematic storytelling with engaging gameplay variety
